creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
Hello,

I'm upgraded my fbsd box and try build in jail (freebsd 9.1 i386), but I =
haven't similiar build errors. Please give additional infromation by =
your system:

- Version of freebsd box.
- List installed ports with versions.
- make.conf.
